title: Info-Smog: local conditions and forecasts - Canada.ca
content:
## Info-Smog: local conditions and forecasts
To find out about current conditions and air quality forecasts for your area:

## Air quality current conditions
- Real-time Air Quality Index (AQI) in Quebec (source: MELCC du Québec)
- Real-time Air Quality Index (AQI) for the city of Montreal (in French only)

## Air quality forecasts
- Info-Smog air quality forecasts based on AQI (Quebec only)
- Air Quality Health Index (AQHI) for Montreal, Quebec City and Gatineau
- Smog warnings in effect are presented on the Public Weather Alerts for Quebec webpage.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
